title: Lotto247 Backs SWD Eagles Rugby Team as Sponsor for 2024 Season
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Lotto247, an online lottery...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Lotto247, an online lottery platform, announces its official sponsorship of the South Western Districts Eagles for the upcoming 2024 season.


> This alliance will see Lotto247 rally behind one of South Africa's most prominent provincial rugby union teams as they compete in the Currie Cup First Division and SA Cup competitions.


The partnership allows Lotto247 to invest in the shared moments of excitement, suspense, and celebration that the Eagles create each match. The team truly reflects Lotto247's vision of using entertainment to captivate audiences.

By joining forces with the SWD Eagles, Lotto247 is also throwing its weight behind the promotion of rugby and the encouragement of community-level sports initiatives, highlighting the essential role of local teams in shaping future talents.

Paul Robinson, Lotto247.co.za's marketing director, expressed his anticipation. “The Eagles are soaring into the 2024 season with Lotto247 at their backs. This team has tremendous heart. When they take to the field, they represent the hopes of their community.”


> “We aim to empower the Eagles to play their best game and make their region proud. The Currie Cup is the proving ground where champions are forged. Together with the Eagles, we hope to help write the next chapter of South African rugby history.”


The South Western District Rugby Union has over their proud 125-year history developed players who have risen to the ranks of the Springboks. The Union also contributed top coaching and referee talent to the national side. Lotto247 is honoured to stand arm-in-arm with a team so deeply rooted in the values of sportsmanship.

Rugby is an integral part of South Africa’s cultural fabric. The game has an unrivalled energy that fosters a sense of togetherness and collective pride. Lotto247 wants to be part of that spirit.

Lotto247 is excited to connect with Eagles fans and join in on the action-packed 2024 season alongside players, supporters, and the wider rugby community.

For more information about the sponsorship, please contact:

Paul RobinsonDirector

About Lotto247

Lotto247 provides South African players with secure and responsible access to the biggest global lotteries. As a licensed online lottery service, transparency and integrity drive its operations.

About the SWD Eagles

The SWD Eagles are a provincial rugby union team based in George in the Western Cape province. The Eagles play at Outeniqua Park and compete in the Currie Cup and other domestic rugby competitions.

They have won the Bankfin Cup, ABSA Currie Cup First Division, and the Currie Cup First Division over their history.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
